document.source_title: Social Security Payments May 2026: Who will receive SSA checks on May 20?

claims.claim_text: The second wave of May 2026 Social Security payments is scheduled to arrive this week.
claims.evidence_text: The second wave of May 2026 Social Security payments is scheduled to arrive this week, with millions of beneficiaries set to receive their monthly checks on Wednesday (May 20).

entities.name: Social Security Administration
entities.description: The agency responsible for administering Social Security benefits.
entities.evidence_text: According to the Social Security Administration payment calendar.

events.evidence_text: Recipients born between the 11th and 20th of their birth month are scheduled to receive benefits on Wednesday, (May 20).

metrics.name: maximum monthly Social Security retirement benefit
metrics.evidence_text: A worker who earned the taxable maximum income throughout their career and claims benefits at full retirement age in 2026 could receive up to about $4,152 per month.

metrics.name: average monthly retirement benefit
metrics.evidence_text: As of March 2026, the average monthly retirement benefit stands at $2,024.77.

metrics.name: maximum SSI payment for an individual
metrics.evidence_text: In 2026, the maximum SSI payment is $994 per month for an individual.

metrics.name: maximum SSI payment for a couple
metrics.evidence_text: In 2026, the maximum SSI payment is $1,491 for a couple.

citations.title: Social Security Payments May 2026: Who will receive SSA checks on May 20?

source_credibility.reason: The source provides specific details about Social Security payments and is a recognized news outlet.
